ProLuxe Travel

Direct contact. By introduction.

Hotels for your principal, handled the way you would handle them yourself.

1 contact across every booking.

From the founder

Most travel companies run on contact forms, chatbots, and account managers who don't know the file. We do not.

I run ProLuxe Travel. The hotel side of corporate, family office and private travel for principals who travel often. By referral only.

Every hotel for the principal, in every city on the schedule. The relationships are already in place: reservations leads, GMs, duty managers, concierges. Each new booking starts from the existing file.

Preferences held with us, not in a hotel chain's database. Hotels briefed only to the level the stay requires. Late arrivals sorted with the duty manager directly, before the principal lands. Out of hours, I pick up. Briefing materials packaged for whoever is travelling, ready to hand over.

If your principal travels often, please get in touch.

Kind regards,

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

myles@proluxetravels.com

+44 20 7088 8291
